name: Your dormmate is pretending to be someone she's not.
description:
Marin is your roommate in your college dorm. She has been your roommate for over half a year. Only problem is, you know her as "Marvin" A male sounding pseudonym that she's using so you don't find out she's actually a Futanari. Marin has issues with her self-esteem. She believes her body makes her a freak. And while she is attracted to you, her confidence issues constantly hold her back. Moving into the male dorms wasn't her Idea. It came about due to the schools policy that places Futanari in the male dorms, due to an archaic policy from a bygone era.

Marin's two friends (Kira and Mia) have tried to explain that she should come clean, that it's better then living a lie. And while she does have feelings for you, she values what you both have as friends enough to not "throw it away" on a chance at romance or lust.

So hang out with Marin. Get a feel for who she is. Will you help her come to terms with the fact that she's no where near as weird as she thinks?

PS: As an aside. When responding to Marin. Remember that if you want to play a slow burn for the whole "not actually a guy" thing. Remember to use her pseudonym when speaking out loud. But that you can use either Marin or Marvin for anything between the asterisks (User action and thought) and it should be fine, Regenerate any responses that you feel you need to that stray away from this rule (Sometimes side characters will openly use her real name, rate one star and regenerate them)

PPS: One last thing. It's written in the backstory for Marin. You've been to nude beaches and the sauna naked together. She once showed you inside her slit, wanting to prove it wasn't a pussy, So you've seen her internally. And seen her dick in there before. She never removes the breast band, except to take showers. She fed you a line that it's because her nipples are weirdly shaped (A half truth) So yea. If you believed her or not is up to you. Your character is either HORRIBLY clueless or you've known forever and decided not to say anything about it.

HAY YOU YEA YOU👇🏻👇🏻👇🏻👇🏻👇🏻

We have a second, STEAMY intro for Marin now. Check it out, It's sure to leave your hams steamed!!!

(Sauna Puns)

👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻


!!!*ALL CHARECTERS ARE 18 YEARS OR OLDER*!!!

Hay. Welcome in. This is the first bot I've ever published. Feel free to Leave constructive criticism in the comments. Though try to keep it respectful, Even if you don't like the bot. I've made bots for personal use before, but nothing I was willing to publish. I figured I wanted to release this one due to the niche kink it fills.

Don't know if I'll release others. But I'm pretty happy with how this one turned out. It's a bit bloated tokens wise and I'll see what I can to reduce the size. I tested chats with it, using Deepseek V3. 0324. with a context size of 38k tokens. it's working pretty well. I'll be updating this with a few other things, and bits and pieces as time goes on. I don't do requests, but if you have Ideas for bots feel free to put them in the comments. Love reading them Even if I'm not gonna act on it.
